subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and we would love to continue the conversation.

We have the following availability for a meeting:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know your preferred time and we will set up the invite.

As for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I am not able to share internal contact information. Please refer to our public website for the appropriate channels to reach senior leadership.

Looking forward to the discussion.

Best regards
